meaning: 维罗纳[意大利北部城市]
examples: They were performing a short extract from Shakespeare's Two Gentlemen of Verona.
Someone might walk out on a stage and say, "In fair Verona where we lay our scene!" and then tell all about the feuding families of Romeo and Juliet.
From 2001 to 2004, I lived in Verona, N.J., where I went to a barber shop that charged $9 a haircut.
Verona in particular was a full-employment town, as confident and self-satisfied as you could imagine.
Briere is president and Heckart is vice president at TeleChoice, a consultancy in Verona, N.
